name: SEO Analyzer Pro
description: Professional on-page SEO audit: SERP preview, image alt audit, link analysis, schema detection, scoring & export.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'none';
